titleStmt.title: SII 15.92: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 92. (B.K. No. 238 of 1926-27.) SŪḌI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a broken stone near the Viṭhōba temple.

This inscription commences with the Chālukya praśasti and refers to the reign of a Chālukya king whose name is lost. Of the date portion, only Pushya ba. 13, Thursday is preserved. It describes the family of Sinda feudatories and mentions Simha and his queen Kētaladēvī.
It registers a gift of land and seems to refer in this connection to the preceptor Sōmēśvara who was its recipient. The epigraph is damaged and some portions are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The right portion of the stone is broken and missing.
div.p:
© Ōṁ namaśśivāya . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbi caṁdracāmaracāravē . traiḷōkya na
jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇō¨rvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitā¨rṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōnnata daṁṣṭrāgra
śrīmaccāḷukyacakrēsvarara mahimeyaṁ baṇṇisalballarē vāksāmānya¨rmmaṁ
daṁtapratima nijabhujaikadaṁḍanugrājikēḷirāyaṁ vikrāntadiṁ rātriyene
bhuvanamaṁ tanna tējadiṁḍaṁ pudidatyabhinutivettaṁ bhūvallabhamastakaratnanenipa
bha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsraya ku
rājyamuttarōttarābhivṛddhiprava¨rddhamānamācaṁdra¨rkkatāraṁ saluttamire . ta
ta prōtpāṭanapaṭuvenippanācugibhāpa . jagavellaṁ kaḍupiṁge kaṁṭaḷipinaṁ pe
ḷ haṁpana haṁpaneyda paraputtuṁ bīrada¨rddedalācugi bhūpaṁ bhujadaṁḍadō
maracaradhuraṁdhararu¨rvvījanatā jivhāvana¨rttanana¨rttakaruddhatārikarikari kēsarigaḷa
du¨rddharadhai¨rya[¨rṣa]ṭpadā¨rtthaveṁtaṁtesedaru . Avaroḷ vīrarasaikā¨rṇnavaninda
siṁgarasa . Ā vibhu siṁhana kētaladēviymaṁ negaḷda vāgvadhūdēviymaṁ bhū
vigavanavadya siṁgadēva maṇḍaḷikaṁgaṁ janayisidanu¨rvvigaṁ sale dinapa
kalpera tannapesare pesarāgesedaṁ naḍanaḍa naḍugal tageva¨rkkiḍigiḍi
ḷ callavādudājivyasanaṁ siḍilge kaḍikeygaṁ kāyvu nīḷdeḷva
yoḷatyāśca¨ryyamappannaga . māḷava cō
jāhuti hūṇa bhoṭṭabhūpāḷakamaṇḍaḷēśvarara nattiyo
yēḷuṁ koṁbēḷuṁ manavedaṁ nijaniśitakhaḷgadhārājaḷadoḷ
ttaṁtammarasiyarala¨rggaṇna beḷaganīkṣisalaṇna¨rppiriduṁ dhuradi
yoḷ samanāro mikka bhūbhujaradaṭiṁge siṁgamesa
tabrajakelle vajrapaṁjaramenal sadriśaṁ bhuvanāntarā
raṁ samadamaṁḍaḷikamadagajamṛgēṁdraṁ vibhavadēvēṁdraṁ
sūṟekāraṁ Aṇnanaṁkakāṟaṁ du¨rggatrayatri
kaṁ ripunṛpatisādhakaṁ toḍare balgaṁdhaṁ nuḍidante na
manubhayasāmyadiṁ duṣṭajanaviśiṣṭa pra
yuttami¨rddu . jaḷanidhiparivṛta vasudhā
. Enisida paṭṭaṇadoḷ naṭṭane
Enipavara śiṣyaru¨rvvījanavaṁdya[¨rssa]
Ā munināthana śiṣya sōmēśvara
Ele cā¨rvvākavarāka mūkapada
ve ni¨rvvuddhiyenippa baudda biḍu nīṁ vādi
ṇamōnānuṣṭhāna japasamādhi
lāṭa . sarasakavikāvya
datraya tripathagāhi mā
rumenisida manneya vaḷiya
puṣya bahuḷa 13 briha
kkaṁ khaṇḍasphuṭita jī¨rṇnō
nnasina holadalu
kallanikki biṭṭa mattar
haṁpayageṟeya
rippatteṁṭu . bidi
ttari¨rppatta
gonu The stone breaks off
Digital edition of SII 15.92 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
